calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-05-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR #7235.

Stephen H.M. Wong, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Henry Jiang, who was placed under oath and examined.
Edward Higginbotham, Esq. appeared for defendant Avital Lando, who was not present at today's hearing.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was filed on March 24, 2010.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Wong. In accordance with the terms of the settlement, defendant Avital Lando shall move-out and return the keys, of the subject premises, located @ 600 24th Avenue, Apartment #3, San Francisco, CA 94121, no later than midnight on May 31, 2010. The subject premises shall be broom clean, and the keys shall be returned to plaintiff's counsel. Within five days of receiving the keys from defendant Avital Lando, plaintiff Henry Jiang shall dismiss this matter, with prejudice, and waive all past-due rent, interest, attorney fees & costs. Defendant shall waive all claims as to the subject premises, and a mutual release pursuant to Civil Code Section 1542 shall issue. Plaintiff Henry Jiang was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and his understanding of this settlement.

If defendant Avital Lando does not adhere to the terms of the settlement agreement set forth above, plaintiff Henry Jiang may, through ex parte application with twenty-four hours notice to defendant, obtain judgment against defendant.

Mr. Higginbotham shall reduce the terms of this agreement into writing, and submit same to all parties for approval & signature.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEPHEN H. M. WONG, TEL. NO. 981-3880 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. EDWARD M. HIGGINBOTHAM, TEL. NO. 956-1600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE. ON THE SECOND CALL OF THE MATTER AT 10:05 A.M., THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. PLAINTIFF HENRY JIANG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO HIS DEFENSE OF BREACH OF WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. RENEE SCHIAIBLE, TEL. NO. 981-3880 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. EDWARD M. HIGGINBOTHAM, TEL. NO. 956-1600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT AVITAL LANDO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 5 DAYS TO ANSWER. FILED COMPLAINT INCLUDES THE 3 DAY NOTICE. COUNSEL ARE DIRECTED TO READ AND FOLLOW LOCAL RULE 2.6. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
